results.title: Acme AI Vendor Intake
results.snippet: Acme AI vendor intake page covering data handling practices, encryption standards, and security certifications.

pages.title: Acme AI Vendor Intake
pages.content:
## Data Handling
Acme AI processes customer data strictly according to the agreed-upon Data Processing Agreement. All data is stored within regional data centers located in the EU and US, with clear data residency controls. Customer data is logically separated using tenant isolation at the database and application layers. Acme AI does not use customer data for training its models unless explicitly authorized. Data retention follows the customer-defined policies, with automatic purging available upon contract termination.

## Encryption
All data in transit is encrypted using TLS 1.3 with strong cipher suites. Data at rest is encrypted with AES-256. Key management is handled via a Hardware Security Module (HSM) and keys are rotated every 90 days. Acme AI supports customer-managed encryption keys (CMEK) for enterprise plans. Internal administrative access to production systems requires multi-factor authentication and is logged.

## Certifications
Acme AI is SOC 2 Type II compliant, with the latest report covering the period ending Q3 2025. The platform holds ISO 27001:2022 certification and is listed on the CSA STAR registry. Acme AI participates in annual third-party penetration testing by an independent CREST-accredited firm. The latest penetration test summary is available under NDA upon request. Additionally, the product has undergone a HIPAA readiness assessment and can support HIPAA-eligible workloads with a Business Associate Agreement (BAA) in place.

## Access Control
Role-based access control (RBAC) is supported with predefined roles (Admin, Analyst, Auditor) and custom roles. All access changes are logged in an immutable audit trail. Single sign-on (SSO) integration supports SAML 2.0 and OIDC.

## Incident Response
Acme AI maintains a 24/7 incident response team with documented procedures. Notifications are sent within 72 hours of a confirmed breach, per contractual obligations.
